name: dev-debugging
description: Hand a Prometheus development or debugging request to the ChatGPT desktop app when the user explicitly asks for that desktop handoff. Use for composing, submitting, proving, and following up on a ChatGPT debugging request; do not invoke for normal debugging that Prometheus can perform directly.
triggers: send this dev issue to chatgpt desktop
hand this debugging task to chatgpt

resources.description: Diagnostic-only ChatGPT handoff template for a stuck approved proposal; it preserves the governed source-execution boundary.
Canonical bounded recovery for window, conversation, prompt transport, modal, helper, and follow-up failures.
Compact mobile session-creation defect handoff example with current ChatGPT tools and approval boundaries.
